title: OKR & Success Metrics Framework
shortDescription: Translate business goals into measurable OKRs with leading and lagging indicators.
jobsToBeDone: Define measurable objectives and key results
Align product metrics to business goals

inputs.label: Business Goals
inputs.example: Increase enterprise revenue 30%, reduce free-to-paid conversion time, expand into async collaboration market

inputs.label: Current Key Metrics & Baselines
inputs.example: MAU: 18M, Free-to-paid conversion: 4.2%, Enterprise ARR: $45M, Avg time-to-convert: 38 days

inputs.label: Team Scope
inputs.example: Growth product team (8 engineers, 2 designers, 1 PM)
